arts.ttl: Newcastle star labels Carabao Cup Final win as 'the best day of my life'
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes promised Newcastle fans when he signed and they were threatened by relegation that he would do everything he could to lead them to a trophy - on Sunday he delivered

arts.ttl: Gary Neville fumes at VAR after late call in Newcastle's Carabao Cup Final triumph
arts.sum: Newcastle United beat Liverpool to win the Carabao Cup final at Wembley but the Magpies' 2-1 victory wasn't without its VAR drama - to the frustration of Gary Neville

arts.ttl: 'Never seen in my life' - Arne Slot explains Dan Burn plan after dramatic Liverpool mismatch
arts.sum: Arne Slot explains tactical decision that helped Dan Burn head in the opening goal as Liverpool lose the Carabao Cup final to Newcastle

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Shock new statistic revealed that lays bare Mohamed Salah's Carabao Cup final struggles
arts.sum: Extent of Reds superstar’s lack of impact against Newcastle at Wembley saw him set an unlikely first in his Anfield career

arts.ttl: 'Immortality' - Newcastle United stars etch names into club history and lift Carabao Cup - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: After some horrendous experiences at Wembley over the years, Newcastle managed a shot at goal on three minutes. For at 18.30pm the last blast of John Brooks' whistle signalled history had been made and Newcastle United's agony is over!

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's next five fixtures compare to Liverpool's after slender Chelsea win
arts.sum: How Arsenal's next five Premier League fixtures compare to runaway leaders Liverpool after the Gunners beat Chelsea 1-0 on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher tells Liverpool to sign two players this summer after calling their 2-1 defeat by Newcastle 'probably one of the worst Reds performances I've seen in a cup final'
arts.sum: Slot replaced Jurgen Klopp as Liverpool manager last summer and has since only made one first-team signing, bringing in Federico Chiesa - who scored a late consolation goal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 5 realistic replacements for Virgil van Dijk at Liverpool
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk is yet to extend his Liverpool contract and the Reds may well need a replacement this summer. Here are five realistic options for filling the void.

arts.ttl: Liverpool expected to sign two new players as huge weakness identified in Carabao Cup final loss
arts.sum: Reds’ glaring transfer need made abundantly clear during difficult week that also saw the end of their Champions League hopes

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe ‘will never forget’ day Newcastle broke trophy drought
arts.sum: ‘The players delivered under pressure,’ says manager Liverpool’s Arne Slot: ‘Exactly the way they wanted it’ Eddie Howe lauded Newcastle’s Carabao Cup final win against Liverpool as a day the club “will never forget” after securing their first major domestic trophy in 70 years. Dan Burn and Alexander Isak set Newcastle on their way to victory, with Federico Chiesa scoring a late consolation for Liverpool. There was pure elation in the black-and-white half of Wembley, packed with more than 32,000 Newcastle fans, at full time as they celebrated the end of a seven-decade long wait since winning the 1955 FA Cup. Victory earned a Uefa Conference League spot for next season. Continue reading...
